questions.question: Describe Big O notation and its importance in algorithm analysis. What does it represent, and why is it used?
questions.hint: Focus on the key concepts and examples of Big O notation

questions.question: What is the difference between a time complexity and a space complexity? Provide an example of an algorithm with high time complexity and low space complexity.
questions.hint: Use examples of common algorithms such as sorting or searching

questions.question: Explain the concept of pseudo-code and its role in algorithm design. How does it differ from actual programming languages like Java or Python?
questions.hint: Focus on the key benefits and importance of pseudo-code
